summary: Excellent matrix recording captures a scorching summer show highlighted by the final Rubin & Cherise jam.
review: The audience‑sourced matrix mix is praised as perfect, delivering crystal‑clear sound that throws listeners back to that hot June night in 1991. The performance itself is described as on fire, with fans especially remembering the last Rubin & Cherise and a sweet jam outro, making it one of the standout shows of the summer.

ai_rating.rationale: All reviewers rave about both the musical performance and the matrix recording quality; with four reviews (three high‑rating, one non‑rated) the consensus points to an excellent show captured in excellent sound.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Matrix mix described as perfect and great sounding; captures ambience of a hot summer day with clear, balanced audio.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Fans recall a high‑energy, sun‑blasted performance that kept the band "on fire" throughout, climaxing with the memorable final Rubin & Cherise and a sweet jam outro.
